alternatives.name: Dynamic UPS / Flywheel
alternatives.tradeoffs: Excellent sub-50ms ride-through; rotating-mass footprint; diesel ride-over dependence; no revenue stack; no decarbonisation

alternatives.name: Static Battery UPS
alternatives.tradeoffs: IT-grade N+1; minutes-scale autonomy; limited grid-services; narrow revenue stack

alternatives.name: Active Voltage Conditioner / DVR
alternatives.tradeoffs: Sub-cycle injection; sag-only (no outage ride-through); cannot dispatch energy

alternatives.name: Stored-energy system with bidirectional grid interface
alternatives.unspsc: custom: Battery Energy Storage System EPC Services
alternatives.tradeoffs: Revenue-stack + decarbonisation + outage ride-through; sub-200ms transition and SEMI F47 proof still to be earned; fire-clearance burden; first-reference risk

alternatives.name: Do nothing / accept SEMI F47 non-compliance
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero capex; wafer-scrap exposure hundreds of k€/event; insurance premium load
